prompt:
Audit these PromptEnvelope artifacts for barrier violations in Phase 1/1b.

Important audit rule: `withheld_context` is part of the serialized audit artifact for validation and is visible to you, the auditor. Do NOT treat the mere presence of withheld samples inside `withheld_context` as a leak. A leak exists only if withheld implementation samples appear in `prompt` or in inappropriate visible context, or if the prompt instructs the red side to inspect implementation material.

Expected barrier:
- Red team and red reviewers may see NLSpec test criteria, data model, integration smoke, project language, red test file content, red review feedback, and red output paths.
- Red team and red reviewers must not see implementation code in their prompt or visible context.

Envelope paths to replay:
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1/red-team.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1/red-team-iteration2.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1/red-team-iteration3.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1b/red-team-test-reviewer-r2.json
- /Users/thomas/Projects/lightless-labs/public/foundry/runs/pi-from-scratch-roman-numeral/dispatch/phase1b/cucumber-reviewer-r2.json

Return JSON with fields: status (APPROVE or REJECT), findings (array with severity, category, description, envelope_path). Report any actual leak as P0.

visible_context.label: barrier_expectation
visible_context.content: Red prompts/visible context must not contain implementation code; withheld_context samples are audit poison values, not recipient-visible prompt content.
